reason: Window lifecycle: main + overlay close=hide handlers in lib.rs setup; macOS reopen; quit via exit_app. Keep lib.rs thin.
The close=hide-to-stay-reusable pattern (already documented for the editor/overlay) now applies to the main window too; reopen + quit lifecycle.
Overlay close behavior (no exit) + the 退出 affordance in the main window shell.
useWindowControls test asserts exit_app on close; it must be updated to assert hide/no-exit per the new lifecycle.
